name: Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
2. Place the pie crust in the prepared pie pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine sugar, molasses, salt, lemon juice, egg yolks, and all spices.
4. Beat until smooth.
5. Add sweet potato puree and half & half; beat until well combined.
6. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites with a pinch of salt until stiff peaks form.
7. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the sweet potato mixture.
8. Pour filling into prepared pie shell.
9. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes.
10. Reduce oven temperature to 350°F and bake until custard is set (35-40 minutes).
11. Stir whipped cream with rum or rum flavoring to taste.
12. Serve the pie garnished with flavored whipped cream.
